title: Another Macarius.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Macarius another monk, wrote at Rome books Against the mathematicians, in which labour he sought the comfort of oriental writings.
